def negative_view_or_handler_performs_direct_file_system_io():
    rule_id = "view_or_handler_performs_direct_file_system_io"
    family = "architecture"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Route handler or view calls open(), os.path, or pathlib directly on the request path."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
